title: Date of TODAY is wrong
excerpt: Check this weirdness out. It worked all day today while testing. Wondering if it’s a UTC problem I’ve seen elsewhere…

posts.author: jscottsmith (Scott Smith)
posts.cookedHtml: Check this weirdness out. It worked all day today while testing. Wondering if it’s a UTC problem I’ve seen elsewhere…

posts.author: basdebruin (Bas de Bruin)
posts.cookedHtml:
hi @jscottsmith
It sure sound like a timezone issue. I developed multiple app that deals with dates and times and it requires good thinking how to handle timezones . I would recommend to start by checking your profile:

image736×577 35.8 KB

Is your timezone set correctly? If it is set correctly I would rerun the test 5 minutes before the day (and in this case the year ) changes in UTC. For example: if your timezone is set to UTC-6 test this at 5.55 PM and 6.05 PM your time. If that give different days it’s worth a support ticket to monday.com I guess

posts.author: jscottsmith (Scott Smith)
posts.cookedHtml:
You got it. No clue how that got changed…
Thanks.

(I’ll double-check tonight when it was causing trouble)

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello all,

Thank you @basdebruin for your solution!
